title: Laura Ingalls Wilder: A Pioneer's Life
titleZh: 劳拉·英格斯·怀德：一位拓荒者的生平

q.en: When and where was Laura Ingalls Wilder born?
q.zh: 劳拉·英格斯·怀德出生在何时何地？

options.en: December 25, 1868, in Dakota according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 1868年12月25日，达科他（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: She was born on February 7, 1867, in the woods of Pepin, Wisconsin.
explain.zh: 她于1867年2月7日出生在威斯康星州佩平的森林里。

q.en: What was the title of Laura's first published book?
q.zh: 劳拉出版的第一本书叫什么名字？

options.en: Little House in the Big Woods
On the Banks of Plum Creek
Little House on the Prairie according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 《大草原上的小木屋》（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: She wrote Little House in the Big Woods about her early years in Wisconsin.
explain.zh: 她写了《大森林里的小木屋》，讲述自己在威斯康星的早年时光。

q.zh: 阿尔曼佐·怀德（Almanzo Wilder）是谁？

options.en: Laura's brother according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 劳拉的哥哥（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Almanzo courted Laura, married her, and they had a daughter named Rose.
explain.zh: 阿尔曼佐追求并娶了劳拉，两人育有一女罗丝。

q.en: What career did Laura's daughter Rose build for herself?
q.zh: 劳拉的女儿罗丝从事了什么职业？

options.en: A farmer according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 农民（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Rose moved to San Francisco and became a well-known journalist.
explain.zh: 罗丝移居旧金山，成为一位知名的记者。

q.en: What happened to Laura's sister Mary?
q.zh: 劳拉的姐姐玛丽发生了什么事？

explain.en: An illness or stroke damaged the nerves of Mary's eyes and she would be blind for the rest of her life.
explain.zh: 一场疾病或中风损伤了玛丽的视神经，她此后一直失明。

q.en: In which town did the Ingalls family become some of the first citizens, in Dakota Territory?
q.zh: 在达科他领地，英格斯一家成为最早居民之一的城镇是哪里？

options.en: Mansfield, Missouri according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 密苏里州的曼斯菲尔德（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The Ingalls family and a few others were the first citizens of what became De Smet, South Dakota.
explain.zh: 英格斯一家等几人是后来成为南达科他州德梅特镇的最早居民。

q.en: The book The Long Winter is based on which real event in Laura's life?
q.zh: 《漫长的冬天》这本书是根据劳拉生活中的哪件真实事件写的？

options.en: A happy summer on the prairie according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 草原上快乐的一个夏天（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: A frightful winter of blizzards in De Smet
options.zh: 在德梅特遭遇可怕暴风雪的冬天

explain.en: The Long Winter tells of the blizzard-filled winter the family survived in De Smet.
explain.zh: 《漫长的冬天》讲述了一家人在德梅特熬过的暴风雪之冬。

q.en: At about what age did Laura begin writing the Little House books?
q.zh: 劳拉大约是在多少岁时开始创作《小木屋》系列的？

options.en: Twenty according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 二十岁（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: In the 1930s, sixty-four-year-old Laura wrote Little House in the Big Woods.
explain.zh: 20世纪30年代，六十四岁的劳拉写下了《大森林里的小木屋》。

q.en: After Laura's death, what happened to her stories?
q.zh: 劳拉去世后，她的故事变成了什么？

options.en: They became a TV series in 1974
options.zh: 在1974年被改编成了电视剧

options.en: They became a movie in 2000 according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 在2000年被拍成了电影（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Her books lived on and became a TV series in 1974.
explain.zh: 她的书流传下来，并于1974年被改编成电视剧。

q.en: According to the book's introduction, what two things shaped Laura's famous books?
q.zh: 根据本书引言，是哪两样东西塑造了劳拉那些著名的书？

options.en: Her love of cities and trains according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 她对城市和火车的喜爱（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: Her close family and her love for wild, open spaces
options.zh: 她亲密的家人，以及她对荒野开阔之地的热爱

explain.en: Her earliest memory featured her close family and her love for wild, open spaces.
explain.zh: 她最早的记忆就包含了亲密的家人和对荒野开阔之地的热爱。

prompt.en: Laura's family faced grasshoppers, blizzards, illness, and fire, yet kept moving forward. What is one hard challenge your family or community has faced, and what helped you get through it?
prompt.zh: 劳拉一家面对过蝗灾、暴风雪、疾病和火灾，却始终向前。你的家庭或社区曾面对过什么困难？是什么帮你们度过的？

en: Think of a real setback and the people who helped.
Connect it to the pioneer 'perseverance' theme in Laura's life.
zh: 想一个真实的挫折，以及帮助你的人。
把它和劳拉生活中拓荒者的“坚韧”主题联系起来。
